features: [Energy Saving Bayonet LED Light Bulb] Replace 60 watt bayonet incandescent bulb with 8.5W LED bulbs, saving 86% on electricity bill.
[Bright LED Bulbs Bayonet] These lightbulbs bayonet fitting light up instantly and cast a nice bright 806lm even and flicker-free light, 180° wide beam angle, uniform cool daylight white light.
[Extremely Long Life] The 60W bayonet light bulbs can last up to 15,000 hours (much longer than incandescent light bulb), reduces the hassle of re-lamp frequency.
[Easy to Install] The bayonet bulbs are easy to fit into standard bayonet fittings or lamp holders, to replace old B22 edison bulb bayonet.

[Wide Application] These daylight white bayonet light bulbs are ideal for kitchen, living room, office, hallway, ceiling light, pendant fixture, chandelier, desk lamp, floor lamp, bedside table lamp, etc.
description: Product Description Energy Saving Bayonet Light Bulbs Energy Efficient Save 86% on your electricity bills by replacing your 60W incandescent with our 8.5W LED light bulb. And the long lifespan will reduce the re-lamp frequency and costs. New Energy Label Rule According to the new ERP standards (EU 2019/2015), the original energy efficiency class "A+" is equal to the current energy efficiency class "F". There is nothing change of its energy efficiency, just different calculation of energy efficiency level. Wide Beam Angle 180° diffused and uniform lighting, which is perfect for residential and commercial lighting, light up your kitchen, study room, shed, home office, studio and workshop. High CRI High colour rendering (CRI > 80) provides vivid colour. Easy to Install The bayonet bulbs are easy to fit into standard bayonet fittings or lamp holders, to replace old B22 edison bulb bayonet. Flicker Free & Eye Friendly These bayonet lightbulbs cast a nice bright 806lm even and flicker-free light.
